daily_summary: 2026-06-08: Risk-on Monday. VIX crashed -14.5% to 18.32 as Iran deal optimism replaced geopolitical fear. Broad rally led by tech (QQQ +1.89%) and small caps (IWM +1.15%). Pivoted from defensive sector rotation (closed XLU, XLV, XLE, CNQ.TO from morning positions) into risk-on momentum plays (XLK, XLI). XLC mean reversion still underwater at RSI 22.3 but holding for bounce. TD.TO continues steady climb. Evaluated ARKK entry via 3-expert council — bear case won (death cross, below all MAs, 0.33x volume). Passed. Keeping $1,443 CAD cash powder for better setup. 4 positions, 35.4% invested.

Industrials cyclical risk-on play. BULLISH trend price>20SMA>50SMA, RSI 59.5. Classic VIX crash beneficiary alongside tech.
